name: TruFin plc
summary: TruFin plc, a holding company, provides financing services in the United Kingdom. The company operates through four segments: Short term finance, Payment services, Publishing, and Other. It engages in distribution of finance products and invoice discounting; publishing of video games; and investment activities. The company also offers early payment services to the public and private sectors; and working capital finance and technology solutions to SMEs. TruFin plc is based in London, the United Kingdom.
